test_cases.input: Agency: EPA. Records: all internal communications about a proposed rule change on industrial wastewater discharge limits for chemical manufacturers in the Ohio River basin, Jan 2023–present. Journalist at an environmental news nonprofit.
test_cases.notes: Letter was structurally sound and legally precise. Fee waiver section was strong. Could have been slightly more specific about document types.

test_cases.input: Agency: Department of Housing and Urban Development. Records: contracts and invoices for a public housing renovation program in a mid-sized city, 2020–2022. Staff reporter at a regional newspaper.
test_cases.notes: Records description was precise and appropriately scoped. Tone was formal and correct. Expedited processing section was omitted appropriately since no urgent safety issue was involved.

test_cases.input: Agency: Department of Defense, specific contracting office. Records: all bid documents and evaluation criteria for a logistics contract awarded to a single vendor in 2021 without competitive bidding. Freelance journalist, no publication attached yet.
test_cases.notes: Handled the freelancer fee waiver challenge honestly. Letter correctly flagged that no-bid procurement records are not automatically exempt. Minor coherence issue in transition between sections.
